title: Bunnyman Traders
description: Adds bunnyman traders to BTA that offer goods for diamonds.
body:
![A bunnyman trader walking towards the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2adc3380186fb8c0e5464b7a9aec278a4af7ca8e.png)
This mod adds bunnyman traders to BTA. They spawn somewhat rarely on the surface and offer goods in exchange for diamonds. They can offer a wide variety of loot ranging from leather to gold. Simply walk up to one and throw a diamond at them and they'll give you what they're holding. After that they won't trade with you anymore.
![A horde of bunnyman traders staring at the camera above.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6192aafbf33c856f93dae17f93586e6bb3fb0e23.png)
